prompt: After multi-signal depth check, choose call.
why_v1: Call controls risk when stack depth does not support a raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling fits when depth still leaves flexibility but not enough leverage to build a bigger pot cleanly.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Call is better when the stack depth still leaves room to maneuver later but not enough clean leverage to justify a bigger pot now. The controlled continue keeps your equity playable without turning a medium-pressure spot into forced aggression.
